---
title: "AIMU Notebooks"
---

Runnable tutorial notebooks for [AIMU](https://github.com/saxman/aimu), ordered to
build understanding incrementally. They are authored as plain-text Quarto `.qmd`
files (markdown with executable `python` cells), so they diff cleanly and are easy
to edit or hand to an AI assistant.

Most notebooks need a live backend (a running Ollama server, a cloud API key, or a
GPU for HuggingFace image/audio models) and gracefully skip sections when a
dependency is missing. By default they are **not executed at render time** (see
`_quarto.yml`); run a cell yourself in Jupyter, or `quarto preview` a notebook, to
execute against your own backend.

## Notebooks

1. [Model Client](01-model-client.qmd)
2. [Conversations](02-conversations.qmd)
3. [Structured Output](03-structured-output.qmd)
4. [Vision Input](04-vision.qmd)
5. [Audio Input](05-audio-input.qmd)
6. [Tools](06-tools.qmd)
7. [Agents](07-agents.qmd)
8. [Agent Skills](08-agent-skills.qmd)
9. [Workflows](09-workflows.qmd)
10. [Prebuilt Agents](10-prebuilt-agents.qmd)
11. [Embeddings](11-embeddings.qmd)
12. [Memory](12-memory.qmd)
13. [Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)](13-rag.qmd)
14. [Prompt Management](14-prompt-management.qmd)
15. [Prompt Tuning](15-prompt-tuning.qmd)
16. [Evaluations](16-evaluations.qmd)
17. [Benchmarking](17-benchmarking.qmd)
18. [Image Generation](18-image-generation.qmd)
19. [Audio Generation](19-audio-generation.qmd)
20. [Speech](20-speech.qmd)
21. [Transcription](21-transcription.qmd)
22. [Async (`aimu.aio`)](22-async.qmd)
23. [Composing Agents (A2A)](23-composing-agents-a2a.qmd)
24. [Personal Assistants](24-personal-assistants.qmd)
25. [Sessions (multi-user)](25-sessions.qmd)
26. [Remote MCP Servers](26-remote-mcp-servers.qmd)
